name: glean
description: Connect Cursor, Windsurf, and Antigravity to your company's knowledge with Glean

glean.mcpServerUrl.description: MCP server URL for Glean. When set, this takes priority over system and user config files.

scripts.build:install:open: npm run package && cursor --install-extension glean.vsix && windsurf --install-extension glean.vsix && antigravity --install-extension glean.vsix && open -a Cursor && open -a Windsurf && open -a Antigravity
